title: Phase 4 shared kitchen practice session conversion
goal: Close Phase 4 in one implementation task by converting /practice/session/:sessionId from the text-first fallback page to a shared-kitchen practice session surface while keeping the old text-first view as fallback-only.
constraints: No extra planning docs or slice-map by default
Default is to close Phase 4 in this one task; only split if a real blocker appears
No Phase 5 ghost-guide or tacit UX expansion
Do not keep the old text-first legal action list on the main practice session route
Keep the old text-first session view as fallback-only
KitchenModeAdapter contract stays unchanged unless truly blocked
Phase 4 verification order is fixed: npm run build -> npm run lint -> @self-reviewer -> npx tsc --noEmit
